name: UniMart Sprint 2 — AI Compliance Checker
description: US-05: Pre-publish compliance scanning. Triggered when a listing is saved. Checks for allergen disclosures, food-safety violations, and policy breaches. Writes result to compliance_checks table.

nodes.name: 🔔 Webhook: Listing Saved
nodes._comment: Call this webhook from Lovable when a seller saves or submits a listing.

parameters.functionCode:
const result = $node['🔍 Run Compliance Rules'].json;
return [{ json: { response: { status: 'Passed', listing_title: result.listing_title, message: `Your listing '${result.listing_title}' passed all compliance checks and is ready to publish.`, flags: [] } } }];

_meta.expected_result: Should flag ALLERGEN_UNDECLARED for peanuts and DESCRIPTION_TOO_SHORT
